ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of clothing size (e.g., Women's, Men's) */,
  "alpha_size" TEXT /* Alpha size representation (e.g., S, M, L) */,
  "numeric_size" INTEGER /* Numeric size representation (e.g., 8, 10, 12) */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Descriptive name for the size chart */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing category */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the size chart was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart associated with this measurement */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Bust measurement range for this size */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Natural waist measurement range for this size */,
  "hip" TEXT /* Full hip measurement range for this size */,
  "shoulder_width" TEXT /* Shoulder width measurement range */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement range */,
  "inseam" TEXT /* Inseam measurement range (for pants) */,
  "chest" TEXT /* Chest measurement range (for tops) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the measurements were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing category (e.g., Women's, Men's) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the category */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the category information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing style (e.g., Dress, Pant) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing category this style belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the clothing style */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the clothing style */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the style information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_styles_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing style associated with this item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart this item corresponds to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of this item available in stock */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the inventory is stored */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Quantity at which a reorder should be initiated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES clothing_styles ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales, inventory manager, customer service) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Encrypted password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the item */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was accessed */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., view, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the system */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the action (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES inventory ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
